notes: Capsule body 0.35×0.9 (smaller than hero, similar to grunt) from npc_mesh.js line 9
Body color is per-NPC-def in legacy (n.color). Default 0x56cfff (5687551) — a soft civilian blue distinct from hero cyan + enemy reds.

Glow ring: RingGeometry(0.45, 0.60, 24), color 0x00ffaa (43690), basic transparent, side=DoubleSide (THREE.DoubleSide = 2). Initial opacity 0 — only lights up when hero is in interaction range (future facet).
Ring lies flat on ground: rotation.x = -PI/2 — for substrate this needs a rotation field on mesh-spec geometry. Today position-only; visual is acceptable for the proof.
Dialog content + routine/schedule behavior (legacy npc_routine.js, npc_schedule.js, npc_routing.js) deferred — dialog is per-NPC content data on a future dialog facet; routines need ai-fsm.
